speaker: VANCE
text: This is Session Ten. You’ve come a long way to get here. You didn’t rush. You didn’t skip ahead. You stayed with the work. Today is not harder. Not faster. It’s complete. You’ll move through a full round. Guided the whole way. Nothing to prove. Nothing to survive. Here is Mac.

speaker: MAC
text: Mac here. Session Ten. Before the round, we warm up. Nothing heavy. Nothing rushed. We prepare the body to move continuously.

speaker: MAC
text: Set your stance. Hands up. We ease in. Jab. Reset. After me. Four at a time. Jab. Reset. One. Jab. Reset. Two. Jab. Reset. Three. Jab. Reset. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Take a breath. Stay loose.

speaker: MAC
text: Before the bell, take a moment. This is a full round. You’ve learned how to stand. How to move. How to protect yourself. How to respond. Whatever pace you choose, it’s enough. Stay present. Trust the work. When the bell rings, we move together.

speaker: MAC
text: Stay with the rhythm. Hands up. Jab. Cross. Settle. Breathe. Slip. Reset. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. Let it come back to you. Move your feet. Small steps. Roll. Hook. Reset. Stay organised. Jab. Pivot. Settle. Breathe. Slip. Cross. Reset. Uppercut. Hook. Settle. You’re managing the space now. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. We’re past halfway. Same pace. Same calm. Hands stay high. Eyes forward. Slip. Roll. Reset. Breathe. Jab. Pivot. Hook. Settle. Uppercut. Cross. Pause. Stay smooth. Final moments. If it feels comfortable, let the hands go. Jab. Cross. Hook. Uppercut. Hook. Finish clean. Stay balanced.

speaker: MAC
text: Let the arms hang. Breathe. That was a full round. Start to finish. You stayed present. You stayed organised. Well done. I’m signing off.

speaker: VANCE
text: Session Ten complete. You didn’t just train. You followed something through. That takes patience. It takes attention. Thank you for trusting this process and for supporting the work behind it. If this helped you, and you know someone who might benefit, you can tell them about it. No obligation. Just a quiet recommendation. Take care of yourself. This round is over. The work stays with you.
